jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BEL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!
